attributes.action: The goverment should give money for fuel if they receive certain benefits.
attributes.additional_details: As if it gets to at high and no one can afford it or only certain people with a substantial amount of money, no one will be able to afford it and the UK will be struggling as they will not have any services as no one can drive.
attributes.background: The government should provide a monthly payment to people if they have money struggles. Around £30.00

rejection.details: We are not sure what you mean by "money struggles". If you'd like a benefit for certain people earning under a certain amount, you could start a petition about that, being more specific.
